name: shouldSkipGate3 returns true when deployment_enabled is not strictly true
description: Pure function tests on shouldSkipGate3 (5 cases). Gate 3 vacuous skip (contract §7.4): fires only when deployment_enabled===true. Cases: (1) {deployment_enabled:false}→skip, (2) {deployment_enabled:true}→no skip, (3) {}→skip (missing field defaults to skip), (4) null→skip, (5) {deployment_enabled:false, extra:'data'}→skip. No I/O — deterministic pure logic.
